# Claudinho — curated repos for the GitHub indexer
#
# One repo per line, formatted as `owner/repo`.
# Lines starting with `#` are comments. Blank lines are ignored.
# To add a repo: just append it. To remove: delete the line.
# Re-running `npx tsx scripts/index-curated.ts` picks up the change.
#
# Don't include orgs (e.g. `anthropics` on its own). For whole-org sweeps
# use `scripts/index-orgs.ts` instead.
#
# History — publishers deliberately excluded:
#   ComposioHQ/awesome-claude-skills — yielded 842 rows, ~800 auto-generated.
#   K-Dense-AI/claude-scientific-skills — claims 125+, would dominate.
#   raintree-technology/claude-starter — claims 40, similar risk.

# === Original curated set (pre-batch-1) ===
anthropics/skills
obra/superpowers
obra/superpowers-skills
mhattingpete/claude-skills-marketplace
trailofbits/skills
michalparkola/tapestry-skills-for-claude-code
remotion-dev/skills
mattpocock/skills
microsoft/azure-skills
supabase/agent-skills

# === Patrick's batch (2026-05-29) ===
# (anthropics/skills, anthropics/knowledge-work-plugins, mattpocock/skills,
# microsoft/azure-skills, obra/superpowers, remotion-dev/skills, supabase/agent-skills,
# vercel-labs/* — already indexed, skipped)
# (open.feishu.cn, skills.volces.com — not github paths, skipped)

addyosmani/agent-skills
# affaan-m/everything-claude-code — DROPPED 2026-05-29. Real repo (178K stars) but
# publishes the same skills across .claude/ .codex/ .cursor/ .gemini/ etc., yielding
# ~768 rows that are duplicates of ~80–110 actual skills. Add back once the indexer
# can filter to a single agent directory.
